title: Shaggy Korean Beef Salt-Block Banchan Jjigae
description: A fresh, shaggy korean dish featuring beef braised in a salt block one-pot meal that is ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: should be cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: enough to cover the salt block completely

instructions: Season the beef with soy sauce and rice wine vinegar. Set aside.
Mince the garlic and ginger finely.
Heat the salt block over medium-high heat until hot enough that a few drops of water sizzle immediately when placed on top, indicating it's ready for cooking at high temperature.
Add minced garlic and ginger to the salt block, stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Add seasoned beef to the salt block. Cook until meat is browned and cooked through, approximately 5 minutes.
Drizzle sesame oil over the beef and mix well with a spoon or spatula to coat evenly.
Stir in minced garlic and ginger with sesame oil again for about 1 minute more to combine flavors.
Sprinkle salt on top of the beef mixture until fully covered. Let sit under high heat for 3-5 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Garnish with green onion slices before serving.
